source_title: Regulation (EU) No 1169/2011 — Food Information to Consumers (FIC)
excerpt: Mandates declaration of 14 major allergens on food labels. Allergens must be emphasized when present as ingredients.
Establishes approved food additives (E-numbers) per food category. Unapproved additives are prohibited.
Current EU organic regulation replacing EC 834/2007. Restricts non-organic ingredients to ≤5% in organic products.

source_title: Regulation (EU) No 1169/2011 — Food Information to Consumers (FIC)
excerpt: Mandates declaration of 14 major allergens on food labels. Allergens must be emphasized when present as ingredients.
Establishes approved food additives (E-numbers) per food category. Unapproved additives are prohibited.
Current EU organic regulation replacing EC 834/2007. Restricts non-organic ingredients to ≤5% in organic products.
